scenarios.title: Computer Vision Modeling and Augmentation
scenarios.when_to_read: Image augmentation, PIL/Pillow operations, vision datasets/transforms, classification and detection models, segmentation, YOLO/SAM/OpenMMLab workflows, and model export.
scenarios.role: Use this repo skill when working with Pillow (PIL fork) image processing: opening/saving images, transforms, formats, metadata, drawing/text, fonts, and custom image plugins.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `pillow` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: drawing and text, formats and metadata, image core, and plugins and extension.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `pillow` when the request names `pillow`, centers on Use this repo skill when working with Pillow PIL fork image processing: opening/saving images, transforms, formats, metadata, drawing/text, fonts, and custom image plugins, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in computer vision modeling and augmentation. Then route to drawing and text, formats and metadata, image core, or plugins and extension when those focused workflows match.
